questions.question_text: Will human brain emulation be the first successful route to human-level digital intelligence?
Will the EU import at least 15 billion cubic meters of natural gas from Russia in any quarter of 2025?
Will mirror reagents or products be added to the Australia Group export control list or national controlled biological agent lists in the U.S., UK, or Canada by 31 December 2032?
Will any major international non-governmental research funders implement specific policies restricting or requiring oversight of mirror biology research by 31 December 2030?

Will China, Russia, the U.S., or the EU publicly announce new economic or trade sanctions that specifically target a state-owned oil or gas entity in Egypt, Jordan, or the United Arab Emirates (UAE) by 30 June 2026?
Will DNA testing vindicate Jeanne Calment as the oldest recorded person in history?
Will a US Supreme Court Justice be impeached and removed before 2030?
Will there be an breakaway European Soccer League match before 2030?
By 2050, will genetic engineering techniques be available which can raise IQ by 10 points?
Will oral semaglutide be approved for the treatment of obesity by the FDA or EMA by 2027?
Will Singapore be the first country to embryo select >10% of its newborns for intelligence?
Will a military conflict between Egypt and Israel cause 1,000 or more deaths before 2030?
Will Bayer cease selling all Roundup products, or substantially reformulate all Roundup products in the United States before 2040?
Will a US court fine, or order a company to pay to claimants, >=$100M because of how they used data to train a large AI model before 2026?
Will a female driver win a NASCAR Cup Series race before 2050?
Will solar power on Earth dominate renewable energy consumption before 2031?
Will Ukraine start revoking passports of military draft age men residing abroad before 2026?
Will 0.5 Gt of atmospheric CO2 be removed annually using enhanced rock weathering before 2040?
By five years after AGI, will nuclear fusion provide >10% of the world’s energy?
Five years after AGI, will there be universal basic income?
Will Ali Khamenei cease to be supreme leader of Iran in 2025?
Before 2030, will a commercially available, general-purpose robot capable of learning new tasks via video be priced under $20,000 USD?

Will there be more 'Protests' in Ireland for the 30 days before 2025-12-28 compared to the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2025-12-21?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: (1+2)/12=0.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 1 or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

Will there be more than ten times as many 'Violence against civilians' in Mayotte for the 30 days before 2025-12-28 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Violence against civilians' over the 360 days preceding 2025-12-21?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Violence against civilians'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Violence against civilians' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Violence against civilians' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.
